ul.li: I/O Overhead: Each component resolution triggers at least one read_block() (4KB) call.
Linear Scan: Entries are compared sequentially using memcmp until a name match or inode == 0 (end of block) is found.

Invariants:
Parent must have S_IFDIR bit in mode.
Intermediate path components must not have S_IFREG set.
Resolution terminates early with ENOENT if lookup fails in any directory.
